items.headline: King Clancy 2026 nominee essay: Alexander Wennberg
items.description: Editor's Note: The King Clancy Memorial Trophy is presented annually to the NHL player who best exemplifies leadership qualities on and off the ice and has made a noteworthy humanitarian contribution in his community. Each NHL club nominates a player to be considered for this recognition, and each nominee has

items.headline: Live NHL Draft Lottery show in real time compelling super-exciting
items.description:
SECAUCUS, N.J. -- The NHL Draft Lottery has always seemed to carry the ingredients of the sport itself, from hope, chance and the belief that one moment could bend the future of a franchise.
The Toronto Maple Leafs gained that opportunity after winning the 2026 version at NHL Network studios

items.headline: Toronto Maple Leafs have huge opportunity after winning Draft Lottery
items.description:
TORONTO -- Congratulations on your new jobs, Mats Sundin and John Chayka.
In lieu of a nice bottle of wine, how does the No. 1 pick in the 2026 NHL Draft sound as a welcoming gift?

items.headline: Mock 2026 Draft: Gavin McKenna to Toronto
items.description:
Following the NHL Draft Lottery on Tuesday, NHL.com deputy managing editor Adam Kimelman and senior draft writer Mike G. Morreale make their predictions for how the first 16 selections of the 2026 Upper Deck NHL Draft could turn out.
The Toronto Maple Leafs won the lottery. Kimelman and Morreale agree

items.headline: Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback for May 6, 2026
items.description: The Stanley Cup Playoffs are in full swing and NHL.com has it all covered. Each day, we will present Stanley Cup Playoffs Playback, your one-stop shop for all the action. Here’s a look at where things stand on Wednesday, May 6:

items.headline: NHL Power Players youth advisory board applications now being accepted 2026
items.description: NEW YORK/TORONTO -- For the eighth straight year, the National Hockey League (NHL®) will accept applications for NHL Power Players™, a youth advisory board which brings together young hockey fans, ages 13-17, to provide input to the NHL on hockey-related topics important to their generation. Starting today through June 3,

items.headline: Minnesota Wild special teams key to comeback bid against Avalanche
items.description: DENVER -- Michael McCarron was succinct when asked what the Minnesota Wild needed to get back into their series against the Colorado Avalanche.

items.headline: Fischler Young Anaheim Ducks Montreal Canadiens are Stanley Cup contenders
items.description: Legendary reporter Stan Fischler writes a weekly scrapbook for NHL.com. Also known as "The Hockey Maven," Fischler brings his mix of insight and humor each Wednesday. This week examines how a blend of youth and speed has turned the Anaheim Ducks and Montreal Canadiens into challengers for the Stanley Cup.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild Colorado Avalanche Game 2 recap May 5 2026
items.description: DENVER -- Nathan MacKinnon had a goal and two assists for the Colorado Avalanche, who extended their lead in the Western Conference Second Round with a 5-2 win against the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 at Ball Arena on Tuesday.​

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs second round schedule television results
items.description: The second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs began Saturday with the Carolina Hurricanes defeating the Philadelphia Flyers 3-0. The second round continued on Sunday with the Colorado Avalanche defeating the Minnesota Wild 9-6.

items.headline: Jim Rutherford stepping down as Vancouver Canucks president
items.description:
VANCOUVER -- Jim Rutherford plans to step down as the Vancouver Canucks president of hockey operations after the 2026 Upper Deck NHL Draft, but he will help hire the next general manager first.
Rutherford made the announcement after the NHL Draft Lottery on Tuesday, when the Canucks fell to the

items.headline: Toronto Maple Leafs win 2026 NHL Draft Lottery
items.description: SECAUCUS, N.J. -- The Toronto Maple Leafs have the No. 1 pick in the 2026 Upper Deck NHL Draft after winning the NHL Draft Lottery on Tuesday.

items.headline: Niagara Falls lights up Buffalo Sabres Montreal Canadiens colors
items.description:
Niagara Falls couldn’t mist the chance to support the Buffalo Sabres and the Montreal Canadiens in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs.
The iconic waterfalls, located on the United States and Canada border, lit up in Sabres and Canadiens colors before the two teams face each other in the Eastern Conference

items.headline: Calder Trophy finalists for best rookie of 2025-26 announced by NHL
items.description:
Ivan Demidov, Matthew Schaefer and Beckett Sennecke were named finalists for the Calder Trophy on Tuesday.
The winner of the award, given annually to the top rookie in the NHL as voted by the Professional Hockey Writers Association, will be announced at a later date.

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks carrying many positives into Game 2 against Golden Knights
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- The Anaheim Ducks were the better team in Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round, despite their 3-1 loss to the Vegas Golden Knights at T-Mobile Arena on Monday.
